keys.meta_description: Enter your work email to start a guided trial. Business domains get instant access; we will guide you through setup.
keys.hero_subtitle: Verify your work email to continue to sign up
keys.whyWorkEmailBody: Work email helps us provision a dedicated workspace for your organization and keep tenant data isolated.
keys.bullet3: Your server and data stay after trial
keys.gate_email_helper: Use your company email to start your free trial.
keys.modal_body_0: Thank you for your interest! For maximum security and data isolation, {brand} typically requires a verified business email for automated setup.
keys.modal_body_1: However, we fully support business founders and unique business cases. Click below to start our Manual Onboarding Process. Our team will personally review your request to provision a dedicated Server instance tailored to your needs.
keys.redirect_success_body: Redirecting you to sign up with {email}
keys.err_gateway_not_configured: Email verification isn't available on this site yet. Please try again later or contact support.
keys.err_service_unavailable: The verification service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
keys.err_network: Couldn't reach the verification service. Check your connection and try again.
keys.err_internal: We couldn't start manual onboarding. Please try again in a few minutes or contact support.
keys.err_schema_migration: Unable to save or load your application. Please try again later.
keys.err_signup_log: We couldn't record your signup attempt. Please try again in a moment or contact support.
keys.err_ip_rate_limit: Too many verification attempts from your network. Please wait an hour and try again.
keys.err_domain_rate_limit: This work email domain has reached the daily verification limit. Contact support if you need help.
keys.err_too_many_checks: Too many verification attempts. Please try again later.
keys.err_token_expired: This verification session has expired. Go back to the trial page, enter your work email, and choose “Start Manual Onboarding” again.
keys.err_invalid_token: We could not load your application. Go back to the trial page, enter your work email, and choose “Start Manual Onboarding” again.
keys.err_link_expired: This link has expired. Go back to the trial page and start manual onboarding again with your work email.
